Tests that declarative WebMCP tool with multiple inputs generates the correct schema.
Enabling WebMCP Domain...
Navigating to a new page...
Tools Added:
  Name: multi_input_tool
  Description: A tool with multiple inputs
  Schema: {}
Tools Removed:
  Name: multi_input_tool
Tools Added:
  Name: multi_input_tool
  Description: A tool with multiple inputs
  Schema: {
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "input_one": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "input_two": {
      "type": "number",
      "multipleOf": 1
    },
    "input_three": {
      "type": "boolean"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "input_one"
  ]
}
